kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

test.name: Basic Freon smoketest for one datanode

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Execute
Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: Running command 'ozone freon ockg -t 1 -n1 -p 70p6Z7HtWj --replication ONE --replication-type RATIS 2>&1'.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Pass Execution If
kw.doc: Conditionally skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.
kw.msg: Execution passed with message: Skip in unsecure cluster

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Execute
Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Execute
kw.arg: ozone admin pipeline list | grep 'ReplicationConfig: RATIS/ONE' | head -n 1 | cut -d' ' -f3 | sed 's/,$//'

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Execute
kw.arg: ozone admin pipeline list --json | jq 'map(.replicationConfig) | contains([{"replicationFactor": "ONE", "replicationType": "RATIS"}])'

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

test.name: List pipelines with explicit host and json option

kw.name: Execute
kw.arg: ozone admin pipeline list --scm ${SCM} --json | jq 'map(.replicationConfig) | contains([{"replicationFactor": "ONE", "replicationType": "RATIS"}])'

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.doc: Conditionally skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

kw.doc: Fails if ``string`` does not match ``pattern`` as a regular expression.

kw.msg: Missing required subcommand Usage: ozone admin pipeline [-hV] [--verbose] [COMMAND] Pipeline specific operations -h, --help Show this help message and exit. -V, --version Print version information and exit. --verbose More verbose output. Show the stack trace of the errors. Commands: list List all active pipelines activate Activates the given Pipeline deactivate Deactivates the given Pipeline create create pipeline close Close pipeline
